since_last: 60% of 87 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +5.14%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 60% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.10% · BTC +0.29% · Gold +0.12% · Nasdaq100 -0.43%. 60% of 87 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +5.14%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +5.14%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.73%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at +17.75%
cards.body: Leaders: MU +17.75%, QCOM +10.78%, CEVA +6.90%, AMAT +6.86%, LRCX +6.32%. Laggards: BABA -2.76%, EQIX -2.63%, APP -1.72%, SAP -1.39%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +4.17% at $160.98
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +4.17% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
